services.heading: ဝန်ဆောင်မှုများ

services.dev_desc: Web, Mobile နှင့် Desktop အတွက် ဆော့ဖ်ဝဲ ဒီဇိုင်းရေးဆွဲ ဖန်တီး
services.rental_desc: သင့်တင့်သော စျေးနှုန်းဖြင့် အသင့်သုံး ဆော့ဖ်ဝဲ ငှားရမ်းဝန်ဆောင်မှု
services.consult_title: IT တိုင်ပင်
services.consult_desc: IT ဖြေရှင်းချက် တိုင်ပင်ဆွေးနွေး စနစ်ချမှတ် နည်းပညာ အကြံပြုပေး

services.mobile_desc: iOS နှင့် Android အတွက် Mobile App ဖန်တီး
services.web_desc: Landing Page မှ E-commerce အထိ ဝဘ်ဆိုဒ် ဒီဇိုင်းရေးဆွဲ

services.db_desc: ဒေတာဘေ့စ် ဒီဇိုင်း ဖန်တီး ထိန်းသိမ်း

showcase.heading: Portfolio
showcase.description: သင့်ဖောက်သည်များအတွက် ဖန်တီးခဲ့သော ပရောဂျက်များ နမူနာ
showcase.project0_title: Back-office စီမံခန့်ခွဲရေး
showcase.project0_desc: Back-office စီမံ နှင့် ရောင်းကောင်ငင် အစီရင်ခံ
showcase.project1_title: Queue ဘွတ်ကင် App
showcase.project1_desc: ဆေးခန်း နှင့် ဆိုင်များအတွက် Queue ဘွတ်ကင်
showcase.project2_desc: Online ရောင်းဝယ်ရေး Platform ပြည့်စုံ
showcase.project3_desc: လုပ်ငန်းကြီးများအတွက် HR စီမံ
showcase.view_details: အသေးစိတ် ကြည့်ရန်
showcase.project0_detail: A complete photobooth software solution designed to handle events of all sizes, from small gatherings to large corporate events.
showcase.project0_features: Automated photo capture, Frame & Filter management, Sales reporting, Instant photo printing, Multi-channel payments, Back-office dashboard
showcase.project1_detail: A back-office system that enables teams to manage sales data, reports and analytics efficiently, directly connected to the photobooth system with real-time data display.
showcase.project1_features: Real-time dashboard, Daily/monthly sales reports, User management, Export to Excel/PDF, Smart notifications, Data backup system
showcase.project2_detail: An enterprise hub platform consolidating task management, HR, and organizational resources into one place.
showcase.project2_features: Task management, HR & Leave management, Internal chat, Document management, Performance reporting, Single Sign-On
showcase.project3_detail: A full-featured online sales platform supporting both B2C and B2B with product management, inventory, order handling, and secure payment processing.
showcase.project3_features: Advanced product management, Shopping cart & payments, Order management, Promotions system, Sales reports, Product reviews

rubkiancode_hero.subtitle1: Custom software, web and mobile app development
rubkiancode_hero.subtitle2: Quality team, on-time delivery, full after-sales support

rubkiancode_services.heading: Coding Services
rubkiancode_services.description: We build custom software of every kind — from websites and mobile apps to enterprise systems and AI integrations
rubkiancode_services.dev_desc: We design, build, test and maintain bespoke software tailored to your exact requirements
rubkiancode_services.rental_desc: Full-stack web development — from Landing Pages and Corporate Sites to full-featured Platforms
rubkiancode_services.consult_desc: Technology consulting, system planning and tech-stack recommendation for your business
rubkiancode_services.mobile_desc: Native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android — fast, cost-effective, modern
rubkiancode_services.web_desc: Integrate AI into your stack — LLMs, Computer Vision and workflow automation
rubkiancode_services.db_desc: Scalable database design, API development and secure backend systems

rubkiancode_photobooth.description: One of the products we built ourselves — a Korean-style photobooth platform with custom software, ready for events of every size

rubkiancode_showcase.heading: Recent Work
rubkiancode_showcase.description: A sample of projects we've delivered across different industries
rubkiancode_showcase.project0_desc: Our complete photobooth platform with full back-office — used at over 1500 live events
rubkiancode_showcase.project1_desc: Bespoke web applications built to each client's exact requirements
rubkiancode_showcase.project2_desc: Central platform for managing tasks, staff and organizational resources
rubkiancode_showcase.project3_desc: Event registration and lucky-draw system, fully customizable per brand and event
rubkiancode_showcase.project0_detail: A complete photobooth software solution we designed and built ourselves. Handles events of every size with full back-office, deployed at 1500+ live events.
rubkiancode_showcase.project0_features: Automated photo capture, Frame & Filter management, Sales reporting, Instant printing, Multi-channel payments, Back-office dashboard
rubkiancode_showcase.project1_detail: Bespoke web application development end-to-end — UX/UI, front-end, back-end, database and cloud deployment.
rubkiancode_showcase.project1_features: Custom UX/UI, Front-end + Back-end, REST API, Database Design, Cloud Deployment, Post-launch Support
rubkiancode_showcase.project2_detail: Enterprise hub consolidating task management, HR, and organizational resources into one place — improving workflow efficiency.
rubkiancode_showcase.project2_features: Task Management, KPI Tracking, Online Reimbursement, Document Management, Performance Reports, Single Sign-On
rubkiancode_showcase.project3_detail: Event registration and Lucky Draw system, fully customizable UI and rules to match each event theme.
rubkiancode_showcase.project3_features: Event Registration, Lucky Draw, Customizable Forms & UI, Configurable Rules & Prizes, Real-time Analytics, High-concurrency Support

rubkiancode_contact.description: Our developer team is ready to listen, advise and propose a solution that fits your budget
rubkiancode_contact.form_subtitle: Describe your project and our team will respond shortly

rubkiancode_footer.description: RubKianCode — Custom software, web and mobile development. End-to-end from design through delivery and post-launch support.
